hero.headline: Steel Shop Drawings & BIM Outsourcing — Built for Japan's Standards
hero.subheadline: SCDC is a Nepal-based structural engineering firm delivering JASS 6-compliant steel shop drawings, structural drawing support, and BIM services — trusted by clients in Japan, Australia, Europe, and the USA.

why.subtitle: Deep technical expertise and real-world construction knowledge — delivered with precision.

1.title: Shop Drawings Aligned with JASS 6 Standards
1.body: All our shop drawings are prepared in strict accordance with JASS 6 (Japanese Architectural Standard Specification), ensuring compliance with Japanese industry standards and reliable quality for fabrication and construction.

2.title: Extensive In-House Technical Know-How
2.body: We bring together a strong foundation of accumulated practical knowledge and detailing expertise, developed through hands-on experience in steel fabrication and project coordination.

3.title: Engineering Support for Connections and Joints
3.body: Beyond detailing, we provide valuable input to structural engineers by suggesting practical and efficient solutions for joint details and connection design, improving constructability and drawing clarity.

4.title: Beyond Drawings — Understanding Fabrication and Construction
4.body: We don't just produce drawings. We study the entire workflow from fabrication to site erection, ensuring that our detailing reflects real-world conditions while fully leveraging the power of BIM-based processes.

1.quote: Their drawings arrived fabrication-ready and required almost no rework. Communication in Japanese was smooth throughout the project.

2.quote: SCDC's connection detail proposals saved our engineers significant review time. They understand constructability, not just drafting.

3.quote: We rely on their Tekla models for clash-free coordination across disciplines. Deadlines were met on every milestone.

1.q: Are SCDC's shop drawings compliant with Japanese standards?
1.a: Yes. All shop drawings are prepared in strict accordance with JASS 6, the Japanese Architectural Standard Specification for steel construction, ensuring fabrication-ready quality for the Japanese market.

2.q: Which BIM software does SCDC use?
2.a: Our team works in Tekla Structures, Autodesk Revit, AutoCAD, and Navisworks for clash detection and coordination.

3.q: Where is SCDC located and which markets do you serve?
3.a: SCDC is based in Nepal and operates remotely for clients in Japan, Australia, Europe, and the USA.

4.q: How quickly does SCDC respond to inquiries?
4.a: We respond to all project inquiries within one business day.

servicesOverview.title: Our BIM-Powered Services
servicesOverview.subtitle: Three core services covering the full path from structural design to fabrication.

services.indexSubtitle: From structural drawing support to fabrication-ready shop drawings and full BIM coordination.
services.jassBadge: JASS 6 Compliant — 日本建築学会建築工事標準仕様書
services.ctaBody: Send us your drawings and requirements — we'll respond within one business day.

shopDrawings.title: Steel Shop Drawing Outsourcing
shopDrawings.description: We provide complete steel shop drawing outsourcing based on architectural and structural drawings. Our deliverables include general arrangement drawings, detail drawings, and single-part drawings — all prepared in strict compliance with JASS 6 and Japanese fabrication standards.
shopDrawings.imageAlt: Steel shop drawing sample showing general arrangement and detail views

structuralDrawings.title: Structural Drawing Support & Tracing
structuralDrawings.description: We support structural design offices by preparing and tracing structural drawings from architectural drawings and structural calculations. Our team accurately interprets design intent and produces construction-ready structural drawings that improve workflow efficiency and drawing quality.
structuralDrawings.imageAlt: Structural drawing sample showing framing plans and frame elevations

bimSupport.title: BIM Modeling & Coordination Support
bimSupport.description: We offer comprehensive BIM modeling and coordination services using industry-leading tools including Tekla Structures and Revit. Our BIM-based workflow bridges the gap between design and fabrication, ensuring seamless data handoff and clash-free coordination.
bimSupport.imageAlt: BIM model of a steel structure in Tekla Structures

workflow.title: Our Work Process
workflow.subtitle: Nine structured steps from first inquiry to after-delivery support.

1.title: Inquiry & Consultation
1.desc: Tell us about your project, scope, and schedule.

2.title: Document Review
2.desc: We review your drawings and specifications in detail.

3.title: Proposal & Schedule
3.desc: You receive a clear proposal with scope, schedule, and pricing.

4.title: Contract & NDA
4.desc: We sign a contract and non-disclosure agreement before any work begins.

5.title: Drawing Production / BIM Modeling
5.desc: Our team produces drawings and models to the agreed standards.

6.title: Internal QC Check
6.desc: Every deliverable passes our internal quality control review.

7.title: Client Review & Revisions
7.desc: You review the deliverables; we incorporate your feedback.

8.title: Final Delivery
8.desc: Approved drawings and models are delivered in your required formats.

9.title: After-Delivery Support
9.desc: We remain available for questions and follow-up adjustments.

about.title: About SCDC
about.intro1: SCDC (Steel Construction Drawing Consultancy) is a Nepal-based structural engineering firm specializing in steel shop drawings, structural drawing support, and BIM services for the Japanese construction market and international clients.
about.intro2: We were founded with a clear mission: to bridge the gap between design intent and fabrication reality through precise, JASS 6-compliant drawings and BIM-powered workflows.
about.intro3: Our team of experienced structural engineers and BIM specialists brings together deep technical know-how — built through years of hands-on involvement in steel fabrication projects across diverse industries and structure types.

1.title: Precision
1.desc: Every line on every drawing is checked against the source design.

2.title: Reliability
2.desc: Schedules are commitments. We deliver on every milestone.

3.title: Technical Excellence
3.desc: JASS 6 expertise and BIM mastery, continuously sharpened.

4.title: Client-Focused
4.desc: We adapt to your standards, templates, and workflows.

about.reachBody: Based in Nepal, operating remotely for clients worldwide.

1.name: Japan
1.desc: Structural design offices, fabricators, general contractors, steel manufacturers
